name: io.github.bgirardi99/rappi-mcp
title: Rappi MCP
description: MCP server for Rappi Chile — browse stores, search products, manage cart and checkout via Claude.

environmentVariables.name: RAPPI_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Rappi access token (set automatically by rappi_auth)

environmentVariables.name: RAPPI_REFRESH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Rappi refresh token (set automatically by rappi_auth)
